articles.title: Polkadot (DOT) gains 42% ahead of its long-awaited parachain auctions
articles.description: Polkadot price pushes to new highs over growing excitement for the upcoming parachain auctions and increased interoperability they will support.

articles.title: Ravencoin (RVN) gains 865% as interest in tokenized securities grows
articles.description: The recent controversy over traditional brokerages restricting stock purchases cast a positive light on tokenized securities and boosted interest in projects like Ravencoin.

articles.title: Polkadot Price Analysis: DOT Turns Parabolic and Sets ATH Above $40
articles.description: Polkadot is up by a strong 18% over the past 24 hours as it sets a new ATH price at $40.92. It is also performing well against Bitcoin.

articles.title: BNB price surges as Binance Smart Chain grows in popularity with DeFi
articles.description: Binance Coin passes Tether to become the third-largest crypto by market cap as daily transactions on Binance Smart Chain surpass Ethereum.

articles.title: SEC’s Case Against Ripple and XRP Is Dead Wrong Legally and Factually, Says Former Chair Mary Jo White
articles.description: As Ripple squares up for battle against the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), former SEC Chair Mary Jo White is coming to Ripple’s defense. articles.title: Chainlink integrates with Danal Fintech to support retail Bitcoin payments
articles.description: Despite the selling pressure visible at the time of writing, Chainlink has proven to be one of the largest decentralized finance [DeFi] projects in terms of its market capitalization of $14.10 billion. articles.title: XRP Not a Top-5 Crypto by Market Cap; Falls to ADA and DOT
articles.description: Ripple’s XRP digital token has fallen out of the list of top five cryptocurrencies, when ranked by market capitalization. Dwindling investor confidence and an uncertain future has caused XRP to slide to number seven, behind Binance Coin, Polkadot, and Cardano. Ripple’s token repeatedly challenged Tether for the #3 spot over the past several years. However, … Continued

articles.title: Crypto Market Cap Breaks $1.7 Trillion: Polkadot (DOT) Now Top 4 After 20% Gains
articles.description: Bitcoin shows no signs of slowing down after another record above $56,500. Ethereum has followed by conquering $2,000, and DOT touched $40.

articles.title: Dash Isn’t a Privacy Coin, According to Andreas Antonopoulos
articles.description: In a recent exchange on Twitter regarding enhancing privacy on Bitcoin transactions, renowned cryptocurrency educator Andreas Antonopoulos opined that Dash should not be considered a privacy coin, saying, “Dash isn’t a privacy coin. articles.title: REN price rallies 60%, hitting a new high after recent DeFi integration
articles.description: REN price spiked to a new all-time high shortly after its recent integration with Binance Smart Chain.
